headline: DeepMind Launches Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS with Advanced Voice Control
summary: Google DeepMind has released Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS, the most controllable text-to-speech model to date. It supports advanced audio commands for style and rhythm control across more than 70 languages including Arabic, plus SynthID watermarking. The model is now available via Gemini API and Google Vids.

headline: Anthropic Reveals Subliminal Learning in Large AI Models
summary: Anthropic published a research paper in Nature proving that large language models can transfer traits such as preferences or misalignment through hidden signals in unrelated data. The findings open new dimensions in understanding model behavior and alignment risks.

headline: Adobe Launches Firefly AI Assistant Inside Creative Tools
summary: Adobe has released the new Firefly AI Assistant that works directly inside Photoshop, Illustrator, and Premiere. It integrates with Anthropic's Claude to execute complex multi-step creative tasks autonomously. The public beta will be available in the coming weeks.

headline: Forrester Releases Top 10 Emerging Technologies for 2026
summary: Forrester's new report confirms AI's shift from software to the physical world, highlighting robotics, intelligent agents, and ambient experiences. Agentic AI and Physical AI emerge as the top priorities for the coming year.

headline: Amazon Acquires Globalstar for $11.6 Billion
summary: Amazon has closed the $11.6 billion acquisition of Globalstar to strengthen its satellite network. The deal will support AI projects and data centers in direct competition with Starlink.

headline: Allbirds Fully Transitions to NewBird AI
summary: Allbirds sold its footwear assets to become a pure-play GPU-as-a-Service and AI-native cloud provider. The company raised $50 million during the strategic pivot.

headline: Accenture Invests in General Robotics for Physical AI
summary: Accenture made a strategic investment in General Robotics to deploy general-purpose intelligent robots in manufacturing and logistics. The focus is on advancing Physical AI applications.

headline: Hightouch Hits $100M ARR Powered by AI Marketing Agents
summary: Hightouch achieved explosive growth reaching $100 million in annual recurring revenue. The surge is driven by AI agents that autonomously create personalized advertising campaigns.
